creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
(In reply to Vincent Milum Jr from comment #9)

Yeah, I have read the note above about GlusterFS and ZFS. The test was on FreeBSD 14.2-RELEASE with UFS, in a VM. I think the problem is something related to the new version (11.1), as running GlusterFS 8.4 works perfectly fine in the same environment.
